purpose: Exact operator-supplied inputs required to resume GO closure; this file never contains values.

delivery.destination: /Users/scammermike/Downloads/computexchange/.env.go-closure (gitignored, chmod 600); CX_BACKUP_DECRYPTION_IDENTITY_FILE contains a path to a separate chmod-600 identity file, never the identity value
delivery.format: one NAME=VALUE assignment per requested input; do not place values in chat, git, CI logs, or evidence files

expected_evidence.staging: TLS certificate/headers, external health and source identity, persistent-volume restart, prior-digest rollback and candidate forward-recovery receipts
expected_evidence.backup: encrypted offsite object URI and SHA-256, independent download, isolated decrypt/restore, restored database/object checksums and application verification
expected_evidence.stripe: redacted test-mode fixture IDs covering success, decline, retry/idempotency, refund, dispute, Connect restriction, payout hold/manual release/failure, webhook replay/out-of-order, and reconciliation
expected_evidence.alert: redacted receiver delivery ID, delivery timestamp, acknowledgement, deduplication, and resolved notification
expected_evidence.canary: two approved synthetic buyers and two distinct operator-controlled Metal worker identities exercised within every configured bound
expected_evidence.review: required approving review on the exact-head GO-closure PR from the named non-author collaborator
expected_evidence.governance: exact-candidate approval receipts from the named legal, privacy, tax, payments, security, trust-and-safety, licensing, and support authorities plus PASS receipts for both tabletops, DSAR deletion/export, backup tombstones, and asset/model provenance

inputs.name: STAGING_SSH_TARGET
inputs.accepted_form: existing project-controlled SSH host alias or user@host
inputs.minimum_scope: deploy and operate an isolated persistent staging stack

inputs.name: STAGING_TLS_HOSTNAME
inputs.accepted_form: DNS hostname controlled for staging with valid TLS
inputs.minimum_scope: A/AAAA/CNAME and ACME issuance for the staging endpoint

inputs.name: STAGING_DEPLOYMENT_ROOT
inputs.accepted_form: absolute host path dedicated to ComputExchange staging
inputs.minimum_scope: persistent compose state, evidence, and rollback manifests

inputs.name: STAGING_STORAGE_TLS_HOSTNAME
inputs.accepted_form: DNS hostname controlled for the staging object endpoint with valid TLS
inputs.minimum_scope: A/AAAA/CNAME and ACME issuance for the private-canary object endpoint
inputs.used_by: artifact upload/download through persistent TLS staging

inputs.name: STAGING_BIND_ADDRESS
inputs.accepted_form: specific non-wildcard IPv4 address assigned to the staging host interface
inputs.minimum_scope: bind only the TLS ingress interface governed by the project firewall, VPN, or identity-aware proxy

inputs.name: ACME_EMAIL
inputs.accepted_form: project-controlled operations email address for ACME notices
inputs.minimum_scope: staging certificate issuance only

inputs.name: POSTGRES_PASSWORD
inputs.accepted_form: random staging-only database password of at least 32 URL-safe characters [A-Za-z0-9._~-]
inputs.minimum_scope: cx database in the isolated staging stack only

inputs.name: MINIO_ROOT_USER
inputs.accepted_form: random staging-only MinIO access-key identifier
inputs.minimum_scope: isolated staging object store only

inputs.name: MINIO_ROOT_PASSWORD
inputs.accepted_form: random staging-only MinIO secret of at least 32 characters
inputs.minimum_scope: isolated staging object store only

inputs.name: GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_PASSWORD
inputs.accepted_form: random staging-only Grafana administrator password of at least 32 characters
inputs.minimum_scope: loopback-bound staging Grafana only

inputs.name: CX_TOKEN_KEY
inputs.accepted_form: at least 32 unpredictable bytes, distinct from every other secret
inputs.minimum_scope: encrypt staging OAuth and webhook-secret state only

inputs.name: CX_VERIFICATION_SAMPLE_SECRET
inputs.accepted_form: at least 32 unpredictable bytes distinct from CX_TOKEN_KEY
inputs.minimum_scope: staging verification sampling only

inputs.name: CX_CANDIDATE_CONTROL_IMAGE
inputs.accepted_form: published registry/repository@sha256:<64 lowercase hex> candidate reference
inputs.minimum_scope: pull access to the retained signed candidate image

inputs.name: CX_CANDIDATE_COMMIT
inputs.accepted_form: full 40-character lowercase source commit embedded in the candidate image
inputs.minimum_scope: exact release-source identity

inputs.name: CX_PRIOR_CONTROL_IMAGE
inputs.accepted_form: published registry/repository@sha256:<64 lowercase hex> prior reference
inputs.minimum_scope: pull access and retention through completion of the rollback gate

inputs.name: CX_PRIOR_COMMIT
inputs.accepted_form: full 40-character lowercase source commit embedded in the prior image
inputs.minimum_scope: exact rollback source identity

inputs.name: CX_PROMETHEUS_IMAGE
inputs.accepted_form: reviewed Prometheus registry/repository@sha256:<64 lowercase hex> reference
inputs.minimum_scope: pull access and retention for the canary observation window

inputs.name: CX_ALERTMANAGER_IMAGE
inputs.accepted_form: reviewed Alertmanager registry/repository@sha256:<64 lowercase hex> reference
inputs.minimum_scope: pull access and retention for the canary observation window

inputs.name: CX_GRAFANA_IMAGE
inputs.accepted_form: reviewed Grafana registry/repository@sha256:<64 lowercase hex> reference
inputs.minimum_scope: pull access and retention for the canary observation window

inputs.name: CX_NODE_EXPORTER_IMAGE
inputs.accepted_form: reviewed node-exporter registry/repository@sha256:<64 lowercase hex> reference
inputs.minimum_scope: pull access and retention for the canary observation window

inputs.name: CX_BACKUP_OFFSITE
inputs.accepted_form: s3://bucket/private-prefix at an independent provider or credential boundary
inputs.minimum_scope: put/get/list/delete only within the staging backup prefix
inputs.used_by: encrypted offsite backup and isolated restore

inputs.name: AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID
inputs.accepted_form: restricted S3-compatible access-key identifier
inputs.minimum_scope: staging backup prefix only

inputs.name: AWS_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY
inputs.accepted_form: restricted S3-compatible secret
inputs.minimum_scope: staging backup prefix only

inputs.name: CX_BACKUP_ENCRYPTION_RECIPIENT
inputs.accepted_form: age1... public recipient
inputs.minimum_scope: encrypt the staging backup bundle before upload

inputs.name: CX_BACKUP_DECRYPTION_IDENTITY_FILE
inputs.accepted_form: readable path to the matching age identity; never the identity value
inputs.minimum_scope: isolated restore of the uploaded staging backup

inputs.name: STRIPE_SECRET_KEY
inputs.accepted_form: sk_test_* only
inputs.minimum_scope: test-mode PaymentIntent, refund, dispute fixture, balance, and Connect operations required by the matrix

inputs.name: STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET
inputs.accepted_form: whsec_* for the staging cash-event endpoint
inputs.minimum_scope: test-mode staging endpoint only

inputs.name: CX_CONNECT_WEBHOOK_SECRET
inputs.accepted_form: distinct whsec_* for the staging Connect endpoint
inputs.minimum_scope: test-mode staging Connect endpoint only

inputs.name: CX_CONNECT_CLIENT_ID
inputs.accepted_form: ca_* test platform client identifier
inputs.minimum_scope: test-mode Connect onboarding

inputs.name: STRIPE_TEST_CONNECTED_ACCOUNT_ID
inputs.accepted_form: acct_* test-mode connected account controlled by the project
inputs.minimum_scope: test payout hold/release/failure scenarios only

inputs.name: CX_CANARY_APPROVED_BUYER_EMAILS
inputs.accepted_form: exactly two comma-separated synthetic-data participant email addresses controlled by the project
inputs.minimum_scope: create and authenticate only the two supervised test buyers

inputs.name: CX_CANARY_APPROVED_WORKER_IDS
inputs.accepted_form: exactly two distinct comma-separated UUIDs preassigned to two operator-controlled Metal agents
inputs.minimum_scope: mint credentials and dispatch only to the two supervised test workers
inputs.used_by: private-canary worker admission policy and rehearsal

inputs.name: CX_CANARY_APPROVED_AGENT_VERSIONS
inputs.accepted_form: one to four distinct comma-separated reviewed cx-agent semantic versions
inputs.minimum_scope: admit only release-reviewed agent binaries during the private canary
inputs.used_by: private-canary worker admission policy and rehearsal

inputs.name: CX_CANARY_APPROVED_BUILD_HASHES
inputs.accepted_form: one to four distinct comma-separated lowercase 16-hex build hashes reported by reviewed Metal agent/runtime classes
inputs.minimum_scope: admit only reviewed runtime-authority, model, tuning, and hardware-class combinations
inputs.used_by: private-canary worker admission policy and rehearsal

inputs.name: CX_CANARY_SCENARIO_DRIVER
inputs.accepted_form: absolute path on the staging host to the project-controlled executable implementing the documented strict JSON scenario protocol
inputs.minimum_scope: exercise only synthetic approved participants and Stripe test-mode fixtures
inputs.used_by: counted canary workload, backup/restore, Stripe, alert, and invariant rehearsals

inputs.name: CX_AGENT_RESTART_DRIVER
inputs.accepted_form: absolute path on the staging host to the project-controlled executable implementing the documented strict JSON Metal-agent restart protocol
inputs.minimum_scope: restart exactly the two approved staging Metal agents

inputs.name: GITHUB_RELEASE_REVIEWER_LOGIN
inputs.accepted_form: GitHub login other than joshuahickscorp with write, maintain, or admin permission on the repository
inputs.minimum_scope: independently review and approve the exact-head GO-closure pull request after evidence is complete

inputs.name: GOVERNANCE_APPROVAL_BUNDLE_PATH
inputs.accepted_form: absolute readable path to a JSON receipt conforming to ops/governance-approval-bundle.schema.json and bound to the exact 40-character candidate commit
inputs.minimum_scope: named approvals and exercise receipts for the supervised Stripe-test-mode private canary only; it grants no live-money, public-access, or independently controlled supplier authority
inputs.used_by: legal, privacy, tax, payments, security, trust-and-safety, licensing, support, and incident-readiness closure

inputs.name: ALERT_RECEIVER_WEBHOOK_URL
inputs.accepted_form: HTTPS webhook for an existing genuine on-call receiver
inputs.minimum_scope: deliver, deduplicate, acknowledge, and resolve staging alerts

inputs.name: ALERT_RECEIVER_NAME
inputs.accepted_form: non-secret receiver/system name
inputs.minimum_scope: identify the destination without exposing its private channel or account
